feature: Create ARCHITECTURE.md documenting system design and tech stack decisions
workflow_rationale: This is a documentation-only task creating a single file with no code changes, service dependencies, or complex integration. A simple workflow with one phase and one subtask is appropriate.

phases.name: Architecture Documentation
phases.description: Create comprehensive ARCHITECTURE.md documenting system design, tech stack decisions, and architectural patterns

subtasks.description: Create docs/ARCHITECTURE.md with complete system design documentation

verification.instructions: Review ARCHITECTURE.md for completeness: (1) System overview present, (2) MVVM architecture explained, (3) Technology stack decisions documented with rationale, (4) Data layer (Room/SQLite) documented, (5) UI layer (Jetpack Compose) documented, (6) Dependency injection (Hilt) documented, (7) Module structure defined, (8) Design principles stated, (9) Future considerations noted

subtasks.expected_output: A comprehensive ARCHITECTURE.md file in docs/ directory that explains all major technical decisions and serves as the authoritative reference for system design

required_sections: Architecture Pattern (MVVM) - with explanation and diagram
Technology Stack Decisions - with rationale for each choice
content_requirements.tone: Technical but accessible, explaining WHY decisions were made
content_requirements.target_audience: Developers and AI agents building features for this project

subtasks.notes: Created comprehensive ARCHITECTURE.md documentation covering: system overview with high-level architecture diagram, MVVM pattern explanation with data flow examples, complete technology stack decisions with rationale (Kotlin, Jetpack Compose, Room/SQLite, Hilt), detailed data layer architecture including Room entities/DAOs/repositories and data mappers, UI layer architecture with Compose structure and state management, dependency injection setup with Hilt modules and scopes, complete package/module structure with layer responsibilities, 8 core design principles (Clean Architecture, Offline-First, SOLID, etc.), and extensive future considerations including scalability, performance optimizations, advanced features, and security. Document follows README.md style with clear sections, emojis, code examples, and professional formatting. File is 25KB with 875 lines.

acceptance_criteria: ARCHITECTURE.md file exists in docs/ directory
All required sections are present and comprehensive
Content aligns with README.md tech stack statements

verification_steps.name: File Existence Check
verification_steps.command: test -f docs/ARCHITECTURE.md && echo 'File exists' || echo 'File missing'

verification_strategy.reasoning: Documentation-only change with no functional code modifications - trivial risk level allows skipping comprehensive validation

qa_signoff.summary: Comprehensive ARCHITECTURE.md documentation approved. All 10 required sections present with extensive rationale, code examples, and alignment with README.md. Document exceeds quality standards with 875 lines covering system design, MVVM architecture, tech stack decisions, and future considerations.
